{{Infobox character
| name = The Engineer
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Engineer]] is a subject of inquiry between Shyrax and the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Engineer]] did not ask them to defeat [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax hopes the [[Engineer]] will be prepared.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“The Engineer didn’t ask us to defeat him,” Sola pointed out.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
